results.description: Basic validation query — standard order with delivery date only
results.generated_sql:
SELECT VBAP.KWMENG AS quantity, VBUP.WBSTA AS delivery_status, VBEP.EDATU AS delivery_date, MARD.LABST AS available_stock
FROM VBAP
LEFT JOIN VBUP ON VBAP.VBELN = VBUP.VBELN AND VBAP.POSNR = VBUP.POSNR
LEFT JOIN VBEP ON VBAP.VBELN = VBEP.VBELN AND VBAP.POSNR = VBEP.POSNR
LEFT JOIN MARD ON VBAP.MATNR = MARD.MATNR
WHERE VBAP.VBELN = '0000015353' AND VBAP.POSNR = 10
LIMIT 1

SELECT VBAP.KWMENG AS quantity, VBUP.WBSTA AS delivery_status, VBEP.EDATU AS delivery_date, MARD.LABST AS available_stock
FROM VBAP
LEFT JOIN VBUP ON VBAP.VBELN = VBUP.VBELN AND VBAP.POSNR = VBUP.POSNR
LEFT JOIN VBEP ON VBAP.VBELN = VBEP.VBELN AND VBAP.POSNR = VBEP.POSNR
LEFT JOIN MARD ON VBAP.MATNR = MARD.MATNR
WHERE VBAP.VBELN = '0000015146' AND VBAP.POSNR = 10
LIMIT 1

SELECT VBAP.KWMENG AS quantity, VBUP.WBSTA AS delivery_status, VBEP.EDATU AS delivery_date, MARD.LABST AS available_stock
FROM VBAP

LEFT JOIN VBEP ON VBAP.VBELN = VBEP.VBELN AND VBAP.POSNR = VBEP.POSNR
LEFT JOIN MARD ON VBAP.MATNR = MARD.MATNR
WHERE VBAP.VBELN = '0000015141' AND VBAP.POSNR = 10
LIMIT 1

SELECT VBAP.KWMENG AS quantity, VBUP.WBSTA AS delivery_status, VBEP.EDATU AS delivery_date, MARD.LABST AS available_stock
FROM VBAP

LEFT JOIN VBEP ON VBAP.VBELN = VBEP.VBELN AND VBAP.POSNR = VBEP.POSNR
LEFT JOIN MARD ON VBAP.MATNR = MARD.MATNR
WHERE VBAP.VBELN = '0000000040' AND VBAP.POSNR = 10
LIMIT 1
